seo.title: The Truth About This Market (No One Is Telling You This)
seo.description: In this episode of This or That, Bhartendra Singh sits down with Vijai Mantri (Founder & Chief Investment Strategist, VMFS) to decode what’s really

takeaways.text: News flow and market reality are not the same thing: geopolitics, AI disruption and daily volatility create noise that rarely changes the fundamentals you actually invest in.
Markets tend to move in long cycles of roughly 8 to 10 years, so what feels urgent today usually looks smaller once you zoom out to how industries and returns really play out.
AI is reshaping IT jobs and industries, and Vijai Mantri's honest read is that IT may not deliver the way it once did, a reminder to question any sector you assume will always win.
Chasing direct stocks you do not fully understand can quietly destroy wealth, a point the episode grounds in a real story of a 50 percent portfolio loss.
In uncertain times how you behave as an investor matters more than the headline of the day, and the real choice is whether you act from optimism or from fear.
